titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/213

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=481 status=live modified=2021-04-06 16:05:11.350344+00 | translation moa=482 status=live modified=2021-04-06 16:05:09.761278+00

p.cl: Omnibus Has Litteras uisuris uel Audituris Tam Presentibus quam futuris Iohannes filius Waldeui . Salutem

Noueritis me Concessisse et Hac presenti Carta mea Confirmasse deo et Ecclesie sancte Marie De Melros
et Monachis ibidem deo seruientibus Omnes Donationes et Conuentiones . et Concessiones quas Iohannes de Methkill’ ipsis fecit De terra de Pannesceles Cum Omnibus pertinenciis suis et Libertatibus
et Aeisiamentis Eidem terre de Pannesceles pertinentibus tenendas et habendas ipsis inperpetuum . de Dicto
Iohanne De Methkil et Heredibus suis secundum tenorem cartarum quas ipsi Monachi Habent de dicto Iohanne
super dicta terra . saluo seruicio michi et Heredibus meis de dicto Iohanne De Methkil et Heredibus suis
Contento In Carta mea et Cartis Antecessorum meorum quas dictus Iohannes Habet de eadem terra .

Hiis Testibus Domino Comite Patricio de Dunbar . Patricio filio eius . Willelmo filio eius . Walt’ Olifard . Bernardo
Fraser . Adam de Paulewurth . Rogero de Merlay . Willelmo De Bolteby . Alano filio Alani filii Edgari .
Iohanne filio meo .
To all who shall see or hear these letters, as well present and to come, John son of Waldef sends greeting.

Know me to have granted and by this my charter to have made firm, to God and the church of St Mary at Melrose, and the monks in that place serving God, all donations, agreements, and grants which John of Methil has made to them regarding the land of Penshiel, with all its pertinents, and liberties and easements pertaining to the said land of Penshiel; for them to have and to hold for ever, of the said John of Metliil and his heirs, according to the tenor of the charters which the said monks have of the said John over the said land; saving the service to me and my heirs of the said John of Methil and his heirs, contained in my charter and the charters of my predecessors, which the said John has in respect of the said land.

With these witnesses: the lord earl, Patrick of Dunbar; Patrick, his son; William, his son; Walter Oliohant; Bernard Fraser; Adam of Polwarth; Roger of Merlay; William of Boltby; Alan, son of Alan son of Edgar; John, my son.
